name: memory-mason
description: Sync AI conversations to an Obsidian knowledge base and run Memory Mason knowledge base workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Keep an Obsidian knowledge base in sync across AI coding tools.
interface.longDescription: Memory Mason adds knowledge base compile, query, lint, and status workflows for Codex while the shared knowledge base lives in Obsidian.
defaultPrompt: Use Memory Mason when the task is about compiling, querying, linting, or checking the Obsidian knowledge base.
